description: This episode untangles the massive wave of recent news surrounding ArenaNet, clearing up community confusion between the newly announced 'Mist Bound' card game and the highly anticipated Guild Wars 3. We analyze the studio's fundamental shift in design philosophy as they move away from traditional MMO stagnation toward more kinetic, action-oriented combat systems.

timestamps.label: Tidal Wave of News: Untangling ArenaNet
Mist Bound: Not an MMO, But a Tactical Grid
Guild Wars 3: Structural Teardown and Vision
The Technical Wall: Physics and Combat Philosophy
